chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1651 of 2023 (Sajid Hussain Danwar v. Govt. of Sindh & others) 22-05-2024 Mr. Mumtaz Ali Jahangir Lashari, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistnat A.G Sindh. ***** Petitioner, who claims to be a Hardware Engineer (BPS-17) in Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur, has filed this petition seeking his promotion in 18-Grade. 2. In reply to petition, respondents No.2 to 4/relevant officials of university have filed comments and stated that petitioner has already been awarded Time-Scale in BPS-18 and he is drawing all perks and privileges admissible to grade-18. It is further revealed that petitioner has already filed an appeal for his promotion before the proper forum. 3. In view of such facts, learned counsel for petitioner is seeking disposal of this petition with directions to competent authority to consider the appeal of the petitioner and decide the same within a reasonable time. This proposal has not been opposed by learned AAG. 4. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, if the appeal of the petitioner is still pending before the competent authority, it shall be decided within two months without fail under intimation to this Court through Additional Registrar. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
